notes.zh: TD3 论文分析 DDPG 的价值过估计与训练不稳定问题，并提出双 critic 与延迟策略更新。
notes.en: The TD3 paper analyzes value overestimation and instability in DDPG and introduces twin critics and delayed policy updates.
